description: Virtual time scenario vectors for P0-009 acceptance verification

cases.name: new_clock_at_zero
cases.description: A freshly created VirtualClock starts at tick 0

cases.name: advance_zero_noop
cases.description: advance(0) does not change the clock

cases.name: merge_takes_max_other_larger
cases.description: merge with a clock at 15 when self is at 5 yields 15

cases.name: merge_keeps_self_when_larger
cases.description: merge with a clock at 3 when self is at 20 yields 20

cases.name: reset_to_forward_succeeds
cases.description: reset_to(10) when now=3 succeeds and sets now=10

cases.name: reset_to_same_value_succeeds
cases.description: reset_to(5) when now=5 is a no-op and succeeds

cases.name: reset_to_backward_rejected
cases.description: reset_to(2) when now=10 is rejected with BackwardReset error

cases.name: saturation_at_u64_max
cases.description: next() on u64::MAX saturates rather than wrapping
